004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
023
024/**
025 * Serializes POJO models to Simplified JSON.
026 *
027 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
028 *
029 * Handles <c>Accept</c> types:  <bc>application/json, text/json</bc>
030 * <p>
031 * Produces <c>Content-Type</c> types:  <bc>application/json5</bc>
032 *
033 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
034 * <p>
035 *    This is a JSON serializer that uses simplified notation:
036 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
037 *    <li>Lax quoting of JSON attribute names.
038 *    <li>Single quotes.
039 * </ul>
040 *
041 * <h5 class='figure'>Example output (Map of name/age):</h5>
042 * <p class='bjson'>
043 *    {name:<js>"Alice"</js>,age:30}
044 * </p>
045 *
046 * <h5 class='figure'>Complex (nested object + array):</h5>
047 * <p class='bjson'>
048 *    {name:<js>"Alice"</js>,age:30,address:{street:<js>"123 Main St"</js>,city:<js>"Boston"</js>,state:<js>"MA"</js>},tags:[<js>"a"</js>,<js>"b"</js>,<js>"c"</js>]}
049 * </p>
050 *
051 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
052 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
053 * </ul>
054 *
055 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
056 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JsonBasics">JSON Basics</a>
057 * </ul>
058 */
059@SuppressWarnings({
060   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable
061   "java:S115"  // Constants use naming conventions that embed type info or config keys (e.g. PROP_escapeSolidus)
062})
063public class Json5Serializer extends JsonSerializer {
064
065   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
066
067   /**
068    * Builder class.
069    */
070   public static class Builder extends JsonSerializer.Builder<Builder> {
071
072      private static final Cache<HashKey,Json5Serializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, Json5Serializer.class).build();
073
074      /**
075       * Constructor, default settings.
076       */
077      protected Builder() {
078         quoteChar('\'')
079            .produces("application/json5")
080            .accept("application/json5,text/json5,application/json;q=0.9,text/json;q=0.9");
081      }
082
083      /**
084       * Copy constructor.
085       *
086       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
087       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
088       */
089      protected Builder(Builder copyFrom) {
090         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
091      }
092
093      /**
094       * Copy constructor.
095       *
096       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
097       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
098       */
099      protected Builder(Json5Serializer copyFrom) {
100         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
101      }
102
103      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
104      public Json5Serializer build() {
105         return cache(CACHE).build(Json5Serializer.class);
106      }
107
108      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
109      public Builder copy() {
110         return new Builder(this);
111      }
112
113
114   }
115
116   /** Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode, with whitespace. */
117   public static class Readable extends Json5Serializer {
118
119      /**
120       * Constructor.
121       *
122       * @param builder The builder for this object.
123       */
124      public Readable(Builder builder) {
125         super(builder.useWhitespace());
126      }
127   }
128
129   /** Default serializer, single quotes. */
130   public static final Json5Serializer DEFAULT = new Json5Serializer(create());
131
132   /** Default serializer, single quotes, with whitespace. */
133   public static final Json5Serializer DEFAULT_READABLE = new Readable(create());
134
135   /**
136    * Creates a new builder for this object.
137    *
138    * @return A new builder.
139    */
140   public static Builder create() {
141      return new Builder();
142   }
143
144   /**
145    * Constructor.
146    *
147    * @param builder The builder for this object.
148    */
149   public Json5Serializer(Builder builder) {
150      super(builder);
151   }
152
153   /**
154    * Constructor.
155    *
156    * @param builder The builder for this object.
157    */
158   public Json5Serializer(JsonSerializer.Builder<?> builder) {
159      super(builder.quoteChar('\''));
160   }
161
162   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
163   public Builder copy() {
164      return new Builder(this);
165   }
166
167   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
168   public Json5SerializerSession.Builder createSession() {
169      return Json5SerializerSession.create(this);
170   }
171
172   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
173   public Json5SerializerSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
174
175}
